skills.name: getnote
skills.purpose: Read, search, save, and manage Get note content; provide Get note material to Magic AI workflows.

skills.name: magic-recorder
skills.purpose: Turn rough spoken notes, transcripts, and Get note records into structured Markdown thinking records.

internal_dependencies.name: getnote
internal_dependencies.when: Used when input comes from a Get note link, latest note request, note id, title, date, or keyword.

skills.name: magic-kb-compiler
skills.purpose: Compile raw notes, Get notes, clippings, AI chat records, and practice notes into Magic AI knowledge assets.

internal_dependencies.name: getnote
internal_dependencies.when: Used when the source is a Get note share URL or private Get note record.
